name: New Colstan
startIntroPart1: Prime Minister, our nation has faced many challenges before; Your ancestor and his followers struggled to establish their own colony on a new, undiscovered land. Then for centuries our people languished in poverty until the discovery of rich coal deposits. Thanks to these resources, our country rapidly industrialized and prospered; We were known across the world, until a mysterious storm sent us back into the ancient past
startIntroPart2: Prime Minister, I know this situation is unprecedented, but we need you to lead our nation so we may reindustrialize and prosper once more
declaringWar: A state of war now exists between our civilizations
attacked: We will respond take all necessary measures to defend our country from your barbarism.
defeated: New Colstan has fallen...our world has entered an era of barbarism and darkness...
introduction: Greetings from New Colstan. Our country welcomes you.
afterPeace: Peace among our nations. Lets us industry and trade flourish once more!
tradeRequest: We offer you a lucrative trade deal.
